name: Alamo Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Alamo Pawn & Jewelry is a locally owned San Antonio pawn shop selling collectibles, jewelry, electronics, and instruments through eBay with 100% positive feedback.
description_long:
Alamo Pawn & Jewelry operates as a locally owned and operated pawn shop based in San Antonio, Texas. The business has established an eBay storefront as its primary sales channel, leveraging the platform to reach customers beyond their physical location. With 11,000+ items sold and 514 followers, the business demonstrates consistent activity in the secondary market for pawn and collectible goods.

The company specializes in buying, selling, and trading a diverse inventory typical of pawn operations: fine jewelry (particularly James Avery pieces), vintage and collectible watches, gaming consoles and video games, musical instruments and professional audio equipment, comic books and collectibles, vintage cameras, sporting goods, and consumer electronics. Their eBay store showcases retired jewelry, vintage video game systems, collectible memorabilia, and specialty items like Mac Tools equipment. Pricing appears market-competitive for secondary market goods, with featured items ranging from under $400 to several thousand dollars.

The company distinguishes itself through its focus on niche collectibles and higher-end items rather than typical pawn shop bulk merchandise. Their specialization in James Avery jewelry, gaming collectibles, comic books graded by CGC, and professional musical equipment suggests curation toward collectors and enthusiasts. The 100% positive eBay feedback rating indicates reliable transaction practices and customer satisfaction, which is notable for a business in the secondary goods market.

However, the eBay storefront nature means customers cannot conduct traditional pawn transactions (loans against collateral) through the website—the business operates purely as a reseller of inventory. There is no visible information about physical store location, hours, traditional pawn lending services, or direct contact options beyond eBay's platform. For consumers seeking quick cash loans against personal items, this appears to be a liquidation/resale operation rather than a lending service.
pros: 100% positive feedback rating on eBay indicates reliable seller and transaction practices
11,000+ items sold demonstrates established track record and customer trust
Specializes in collectible and higher-end items (graded comics, James Avery jewelry, gaming consoles) with potential better resale value than standard pawn shops
Wide inventory diversity across jewelry, electronics, music equipment, and collectibles appeals to multiple customer interests
Features professionally photographed listings with detailed product descriptions typical of serious collectors
No visible fees or hidden charges mentioned—straightforward eBay transaction pricing
cons: eBay-only presence limits ability to conduct traditional pawn loans (borrowing against collateral)—operates as reseller, not lender
No visible physical store location, hours of operation, or direct contact information beyond eBay messaging
Cannot assess traditional pawn shop services like quick cash advances, collateral lending, or rapid valuation
Selling through eBay means prices may reflect platform fees and online market rates rather than typical in-person pawn negotiation
No transparency about how items are sourced, graded, or authenticated beyond basic eBay listings
best_for: Collectors and enthusiasts seeking specific vintage or collectible items (gaming, comics, James Avery jewelry) with verified seller reliability
Buyers wanting secondary market goods with 100% positive feedback assurance and detailed product photography
Sellers of collectible items looking to liquidate through established eBay storefront rather than local pawn transactions
diagnosis: Alamo Pawn & Jewelry is best for online buyers seeking verified, collectible secondary market goods with strong seller ratings rather than consumers needing traditional pawn lending services. The primary caveat is that this operates as an eBay reseller, not a physical pawn shop offering collateral-based loans or quick cash advances—those seeking emergency pawn loans should contact their physical location directly or seek other pawn shops.
services: Sale of fine jewelry and watches (particularly James Avery retired pieces)
Vintage and collectible video game systems and gaming equipment resale
Professional audio equipment and musical instruments sales
Comic books and collectibles (including CGC-graded items)
Vintage camera and photography equipment sales
Consumer electronics and home appliances sales
Tools and equipment sales (specialty items like Mac Tools)
Collectible memorabilia and entertainment items sales
meta_description: Alamo Pawn & Jewelry is a locally owned San Antonio pawn shop selling collectibles, jewelry, electronics, and instruments.
